name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior

labels: bug

---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of the unexpected behavior.

## To Reproduce

```bash
agents-md-xray scan .
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full output if possible.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x]
- agents-md-xray version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Add any relevant AGENTS.md content, config snippets, or screenshots.
